about.label: 01 — about
about.title: the person behind the data
about.text:
Analytics Engineer at Itau Unibanco, working at the intersection of data engineering, financial governance and technical consulting.

an atypical path from architecture and urbanism (UNESP + scholarship at University of East London) to data, including financial planning on complex infrastructure projects (PPPs) before moving to tech.

passionate about learning and sharing knowledge. currently deepening my expertise in data mesh and finops.

0.title: analytics engineering reference
0.desc: technical knowledge base built during badge preparation, 7 domains, 22 files, glossary with 60+ terms.

ia.label: 03 — AI in practice
ia.title: how i amplify my work with AI

0.title: planning & learning
0.desc: structured 7 weeks of badge preparation with claude (methodology, templates and tracking). the agent organized, i executed and wrote every line.

1.title: analysis & pipeline
1.desc: i use llms to iterate on sql queries, review pyspark code and document architecture decisions, extending analysis scope without adding time.

2.title: reasoning + tool
2.desc: ai as amplifier, not substitute. each project explicitly documents what was generated and what was thought, transparency as practice.
